error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
calendar_empty_description: There are no events this month.
calendar_event_add_description: Fill in the details for the new event.
validation_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation_password_max: Password must be at most 128 characters.
validation_event_title_required: A title is required for "Other" events
validation_event_end_before_start: The end must be after the start
auth_error_email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
auth_error_email_not_verified: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth_error_invalid_token: This link is invalid or has expired.
auth_login_description: Enter your credentials to access your account.
auth_signup_description: Fill in the details below to get started.
auth_signup_success: Account created. Check your email to verify it.
auth_verify_description: We sent a verification link to {email}.
auth_forgot_description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth_forgot_sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.
auth_reset_success: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth_reset_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
email_verify_body: Click the link below to verify your email address.
email_reset_body: Click the link below to choose a new password. If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
email_change_body: You requested to change your email to {newEmail}. Click the link below to confirm.
settings_email_description: We'll send a confirmation link to your current address.
settings_email_sent: Check your current inbox to confirm the change.
settings_password_description: Other sessions will be signed out.
settings_delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all data.
settings_delete_confirm_description: This action cannot be undone. Enter your password to confirm.
